# About the Author

Gloria Aiyebogun is a passionate advocate for women's emotional healing and empowerment. Through her writing, she offers a compassionate voice to those navigating the painful journey of heartbreak and domestic challenges.

With a deep understanding of the emotional toll that comes from loving deeply and losing, Gloria writes to remind women that they are not alone in their pain — and that healing is always possible.

Her work focuses on guiding readers through grief, rebuilding self-worth, and ultimately finding peace within themselves. She believes that every woman deserves to be seen, heard, and valued — especially in her most vulnerable moments.

Gloria writes from a place of both empathy and strength, knowing that the journey from broken to whole is not easy, but it is always worth it.

When she's not writing, Gloria continues to work with women to help them rediscover their worth, set healthy boundaries, and embrace the freedom that comes from healing.

This book is her gift to every woman who has ever felt broken by love — a reminder that the shattering was never the end of your story.
